title: senecio congestus
intro: Senecio congestus, also known as Round-leaved Groundsel, is a perennial plant species belonging to the daisy family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects, which can help in relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and even exhibiting antimicrobial properties. In herbal preparations, Senecio congestus is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
